title: GoCell Slice Descriptor
description: Defines a Slice, the implementation mapping unit within a Cell. A Slice is the sole write-side for dependency truth via contractUsages.

id.description: Unique slice identifier. Must equal the directory name under cells/{cell-id}/slices/.

belongsToCell.description: The parent cell id. This is a derived-anchor and may be omitted when it can be inferred from the directory path.

contractUsages.description: Contracts this slice depends on, with the role it plays for each.

contract.description: Contract id referenced by this slice.

role.description: The role this slice plays in the contract.

verify.description: Verification targets for this slice. Every contractUsage must have a matching verify.contract entry or a waiver.

contract.description: Contract test identifiers. Each contractUsage must have a corresponding entry here or in waivers.

waivers.description: Temporary waivers for contractUsages that lack a verify.contract entry. Expired waivers are treated as missing.

owner.description: Person or team who approved this waiver.

expiresAt.description: Expiration date (YYYY-MM-DD). After this date the waiver is invalid.

allowedFiles.description: Optional whitelist of files allowed in this slice directory. Enforced by FMT-17.

consistencyLevel.description: Optional override; defaults to the parent cell's consistencyLevel. Must be ≤ cell.consistencyLevel when set.

routeMounts.description: HTTP route mounts driven by codegen. Each entry mounts the slice handler on a parent-cell listener. Codegen aggregates routeMounts across all slices to emit reg.RouteGroup() calls.

listener.description: Listener Go constant reference; must match a cell.yaml listeners[].ref entry.

subPath.description: Path relative to the listener prefix (e.g. /orders).

handlerField.description: Field name on the parent cell struct holding the slice handler.

method.description: Method name to call on the handler. Defaults to RegisterRoutes.

subscribes.description: Event subscriptions driven by codegen. Each entry produces one reg.Subscribe call in cell_gen.go.

sliceField.description: Field name on the parent cell struct holding the slice service.

handler.description: Method name on the slice service.

consumerGroup.description: Consumer group identifier. Defaults to the parent cell id when empty.

transport.description: Event transport protocol. Defaults to "amqp" when empty. Override for non-AMQP transports.
